name: Magical Monsters
short_description: Magical Monster is a casual action game with heavy Rogue-like elements where you explore randomly generated lands. Play at your own pace as you slay monsters, level, upgrade and make a solid build. But do it before you face the champion of the land.
detailed_description:
The old world is shattered by a devastating energy surge.
But from the ashes new isles arise transformed by the magical energy.
In this action roguelite you play a stranded creature that explores various of these isles in search of a way to escape to a more ideal world.
During these explorations you will need to level and make a build so you are prepared for the challenges you will face.

The lair


You always start from your lair.
As you find materials during your exploration you can upgrade parts of your lair unlocking features and new isles you can explore.The state of your lair is persistent and not lost if you die in a run.

Exploration


From your lair you start an exploration on one of the isles you have unlocked.
During an exploration you start from scratch and you have to make a build from what you find.
Each isle has a champion you will face after a fixed period of time. As you progress further in the game the champions will get tougher and you will get more time to prepare. Also the isle will get bigger with more challenges and opportunities.

Core Features

  • explore 6 differently random generated isles with a unique end boss
  • face over 60 different monsters
  • more than 70 different upgrades
  • more than 25 different actions
  • Lair progress is persistent
  • permadeath within runs
